response:
# DataFlow AI Overview

DataFlow AI, founded in 2022, is a data infrastructure startup that has raised $8.5M in Series A funding from prominent investors including Sequoia and Y Combinator, achieving a valuation of $42M. The 18-person team has demonstrated impressive traction with a monthly recurring revenue of $120K and a robust month-over-month growth rate of 25%. This strong performance positions DataFlow AI as a promising player in the competitive data infrastructure sector.
